name: CleanRow - Garmin Daily Sync

parameters._note: You need Garmin Connect OAuth or cookie-based auth. See garminconnect Python library or use a Garmin Connect IQ compatible approach. Alternatively use the garmin-connect npm package in a Function node.

_note: Garmin Connect does not have an official public API. Options: (1) garmin-connect npm package in a Code node with your credentials, (2) garminconnect Python service as a sidecar, (3) Garmin Health API (enterprise). The Transform Data node field paths must be adjusted to the actual response format you get.
